seo.title: Restaurant Website Design | Get More Customers | Crixium Digital
seo.description: We build websites for restaurants, cafes and food businesses. Digital menu, online reservations and Google visibility. Free quote.

hero.badge: Specialists in websites for food businesses
hero.subtitle: We build your restaurant website with a digital menu, reservations and full Google optimization — so customers find you first. Ready in 10 to 20 days.
hero.ctaSubtext: Free quote, no strings attached — Response in less than 24 hours

pain.title: Do any of these sound familiar?

items.text: Customers can't find you on Google Maps or local searches
You only take orders by phone or WhatsApp with no system
You don't have an updated digital menu to share easily
Your competitors already have a website and you don't

fast.title: Ready in 10-20 Days
fast.description: Your website live before the end of the month. No delays, no excuses.

menu.title: Attractive Digital Menu
menu.description: Showcase your dishes with photos, descriptions and prices. Update it anytime.

reservations.title: Reservations & Orders
reservations.description: Reservation form or WhatsApp integration to take orders without chaos.

included.title: Everything included, no surprises
included.subtitle: Your restaurant website ready with everything you need to attract more customers.

items.menu: Digital menu with photos and prices
items.seo: Local SEO for Google Maps and searches
items.responsive: Perfect on mobile (where your customers search)
items.whatsapp: WhatsApp button for orders and reservations
items.speed: Fast loading so you don't lose visitors
items.analytics: Google Analytics to track your visitors

showcase.title: We've done it for other food businesses
showcase.subtitle: This is the type of result you'll get for your restaurant.
showcase.cta: I want something like this for my business

testimonial.title: What our clients say
testimonial.quote: Since launching my website, I get new WhatsApp inquiries from new customers every week. The process was fast and the result exceeded my expectations.
testimonial.author: — Restaurant owner, verified client

guarantee.title: If it's not perfect, we keep working
guarantee.description: We work with you until you're 100% happy with the result. No extra charges.

finalCta.title: Ready to fill more tables with your website?
finalCta.subtitle: Tell us about your restaurant and we'll send you a proposal in less than 24 hours.
finalCta.benefit: No strings attached — Response in less than 24 hours
